new_classes.label_en: Champagne production region (French province of Champagne)
new_classes.definition_en: The designated geographic region of the French province of Champagne from which grapes must exclusively originate and in which the sparkling wine Champagne must be produced, as required for classification under CN subheading 2204 10 11.

new_classes.label_en: Champagne origin quality (grapes exclusively from the Champagne province)
new_classes.label_de: Champagner-Herkunftsqualität (Trauben ausschließlich aus der Provinz Champagne)
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a sparkling wine indicating that it was produced exclusively from grapes harvested in the French province of Champagne and that the production itself took place in that province, as required for classification as Champagne under CN subheading 2204 10 11.

new_classes.label_en: Champagne production process (sparkling wine production in the Champagne province)
new_classes.definition_en: The production process by which Champagne is made: a sparkling wine process carried out in the French province of Champagne, using exclusively grapes harvested in that province.
A sparkling wine produced in the French province of Champagne from grapes exclusively harvested in that province, classified under CN subheading 2204 10 11.

coverage_explanation: The three key distinguishing criteria from the legal text are fully captured: (1) the beverage is a sparkling wine (modelled via SparklingWineQuality, reusing the existing TBox class); (2) it is produced in the French province of Champagne (modelled via ChampagneProductionProcess); (3) grapes are exclusively from that province (modelled via ChampagneOriginQuality). The class Champagne22041011 is placed as a subclass of WineOfFreshGrapes2204, reflecting the correct heading hierarchy. A minor gap (score −0.05) is that the strict geographic exclusivity of the grape origin ('exclusively' constraint) is expressed qualitatively rather than through a formal spatial containment axiom, because no geographic region class with formal boundary axioms exists in the current TBox. The new ChampagneProductionRegion class is introduced for future use but is not yet formally linked to a geographic data infrastructure.
